audienceSections.normal: This chapter teaches [[grammar:eerst ... daarna ... ten slotte ...]] and [[grammar:elk/ieder + singular noun]]. Use [[grammar:ten slotte]] for the last step in a sequence. Use [[grammar:elk]] or [[grammar:ieder]] before a singular noun to mean every or each.
audienceSections.expert: This chapter introduces [[grammar:eerst ... daarna ... ten slotte ...]]: The discourse sequence is explicitly staged and the final connective occupies a V2-compatible adverbial position.; [[grammar:elk/ieder + singular noun]]: The distributive determiner selects singular morphology while ranging over all members of a set.

audienceSections.normal:
#### eerst ... daarna ... ten slotte ...

Use [[grammar:ten slotte]] for the last step in a sequence. Example: [[grammar:Ten slotte sluiten ze elke doos.]]

#### elk/ieder + singular noun

Use [[grammar:elk]] or [[grammar:ieder]] before a singular noun to mean every or each. Example: [[grammar:Ieder pakket krijgt ook één stuk fruit.]]
audienceSections.expert:
#### eerst ... daarna ... ten slotte ...

The discourse sequence is explicitly staged and the final connective occupies a V2-compatible adverbial position. Literal example: [[grammar:Ten slotte sluiten ze elke doos.]]

#### elk/ieder + singular noun

The distributive determiner selects singular morphology while ranging over all members of a set. Literal example: [[grammar:Ieder pakket krijgt ook één stuk fruit.]]

audienceSections.normal: [[grammar:Ten slotte]] marks the final step. [[grammar:Elk]] and [[grammar:ieder]] distribute a statement over singular members of a set.
audienceSections.expert: [[grammar:Ten slotte]] marks the final step. [[grammar:Elk]] and [[grammar:ieder]] distribute a statement over singular members of a set.

breakdown.normal:
- [[grammar:Eerst zet Pieter honderd lege dozen op de tafels.]] — First Pieter puts one hundred empty boxes on the tables.
- [[grammar:Daarna verdeelt Eva het eten in gelijke porties.]] — After that Eva divides the food into equal portions.
- [[grammar:Ze gebruiken twee flessen water per pakket.]] — They use two bottles of water per package.
- [[grammar:Ieder pakket krijgt ook één stuk fruit.]] — Every package also gets one piece of fruit.
- [[grammar:Milan vult de helft van de dozen met brood.]] — Milan fills half of the boxes with bread.
- [[grammar:Lotte vult een kwart met rijst.]] — Lotte fills a quarter with rice.
- [[grammar:Pieter vult het laatste kwart met groente.]] — Pieter fills the final quarter with vegetables.
- [[grammar:Oma Anja controleert achtenveertig pakketten zorgvuldig.]] — Grandma Anja carefully checks forty-eight packages.
- [[grammar:Ten slotte sluiten ze elke doos.]] — Finally they close every box.
- [[grammar:Pieter verdeelt de pakketten over vier gelijke stapels.]] — Pieter divides the parcels into four equal stacks.
- [[grammar:Eva, Oma Anja, Milan en Lotte nemen ieder een stapel mee.]] — Eva, Grandma Anja, Milan, and Lotte each take one stack along.

- [[grammar:Daarna verdeelt Eva het eten in gelijke porties.]] — Literal reading evidence at Narrative > paragraph 1 > sentence 2.

- [[grammar:Ieder pakket krijgt ook één stuk fruit.]] — Literal reading evidence at Narrative > paragraph 1 > sentence 4.
- [[grammar:Milan vult de helft van de dozen met brood.]] — Literal reading evidence at Narrative > paragraph 2 > sentence 1.
- [[grammar:Lotte vult een kwart met rijst.]] — Literal reading evidence at Narrative > paragraph 2 > sentence 2.
- [[grammar:Pieter vult het laatste kwart met groente.]] — Literal reading evidence at Narrative > paragraph 2 > sentence 3.
- [[grammar:Oma Anja controleert achtenveertig pakketten zorgvuldig.]] — Literal reading evidence at Narrative > paragraph 2 > sentence 4.
- [[grammar:Ten slotte sluiten ze elke doos.]] — Literal reading evidence at Narrative > paragraph 3 > sentence 1.
- [[grammar:Pieter verdeelt de pakketten over vier gelijke stapels.]] — Literal reading evidence at Narrative > paragraph 3 > sentence 2.
